task.title: Configuring PDF Output in AEM Guides
task.shortdesc: Configure PDF output settings in AEM Guides.

taskbody.context: Configure PDF output to generate PDF files for your DITA content.

step.info: Select a FrameMaker (.fm or .book) file, then select the Output Presets.
Set the metadata fields, such as author's name, document title, keywords, and copyright information.
Select the Post Generation Workflow and execute the workflow.
